Story Coffee Menu Gallery Experience Visit
Story Coffee Menu Gallery Experience Visit

Karachi, Pakistan

Coffee, signatures, desserts

Menu

Prices are in PKR and change with the season. Ask at the counter for today's single origin and the cake of the day.

Coffee

Single-origin and house blends, pulled with patience.

  • Mazi Espresso House blend

    A short, syrupy shot with cocoa and toasted almond.

    Rs. 350
  • Slow Pour V60 Rotating single origin

    Clean, floral, and bright. Brewed to order, never rushed.

    Rs. 550
  • Café Latte

    Silky steamed milk over a double shot. The everyday comfort.

    Rs. 500
  • Cappuccino

    Equal parts espresso, milk, and a cloud of microfoam.

    Rs. 480
  • Cold Brew

    Steeped eighteen hours, then cut with cold water. Smooth and low-acid.

    Rs. 450

Signature Drinks

Recipes you will only find in this room.

  • Cardamom Kulhad House favourite

    Espresso steamed with green cardamom in a clay cup. Warm and familiar.

    Rs. 520
  • Rose Doodh Patti

    A nostalgic milk tea, gently spiced, finished with rose.

    Rs. 420
  • Date & Oat Shake

    Medjool dates, oats, and cold brew blended into something close to dessert.

    Rs. 580

Desserts

Baked through the morning, gone by evening.

  • Walnut Brownie

    Dense, fudgy, and loaded with toasted walnuts.

    Rs. 380
  • Cinnamon Roll

    Soft spiral, slow-baked, glazed while still warm.

    Rs. 420
  • Seasonal Cake

    One cake a day, decided by the kitchen. Ask at the counter.

    Rs. 400

Seasonal Specials

Here for the weather, not the year.

  • Winter Fig Latte Winter only

    Roasted fig, honey, and a double shot under a cap of foam.

    Rs. 560
  • Summer Citrus Tonic Summer only

    Cold brew, tonic, and a squeeze of kinoo over ice.

    Rs. 480

Mazi

A room for slow mornings and long conversations.

© 2026 Mazi Specialty Coffee. Made for slow mornings.
